summary: FY25 Upgrade: Policy :  Installment are not coming on Installment Schedule Page
description: Create a Policy with effective date 01/07/2025 On Payment Option Page select Quarterly Go to Installment schedule Page Expected result: Instalment Schedule screen is displayed showing 4 equal installments: 1. Current date +28 2. 28/10/2025 3. 28/01/2026 4. 28/04/2026 Actual Result: All installment are not displaying
resolution_comments: Invoice_AccountPlan.InvoiceMethod was overridden in Carrier_Billing_AccountPlanSetup_Select_1_0_0_0 manuscript and default was set to cash hence it was always picking up Invoice method as cash instead of PA. Reverted Custom overridden code.

summary: FY25 Upgrade : Billing : Suspense Allocation row is not Populating under suspense Allocation Tab
description: Click "Payment Processing" from the left-hand menu EXPECTED RESULT "Make a Payment" screen is shown Enter "TEST Payment" on Payment Detail EXPECTED RESULT "Payment Detail" is filled Under "Payment Allocation", select "Pay To Suspense" EXPECTED RESULT Pay To Suspense is succesfully selected Under "Pay To Suspense", enter a payment amount ($1,000) EXPECTED RESULT Payment amount is succesfully selected Click "Submit Payment" EXPECTED RESULT "Payment Detail" screen is displayed with message displaying that payment has been entered Verify that the Account Ledger in the left menu displays correctly. EXPECTED RESULT The Account Ledger should display the following: Net Position: The premium value from the new business transaction less $1,000 Current Amount Due: The premium value from the new business transaction In Suspense Amount: (-$1,000) Click "Payment Processing" from the left-hand menu and select "Suspense Allocation" EXPECTED RESULT "Suspense Allocation" screen is shown Under "Suspense Allocation", select the checkbox for the $1,000 and then under "Pay an invoice", select "Select Receivables". EXPECTED RESULT "Payment Allocation" screen is open Expected Result: User should be able to select the Payment row Actual Result: Payment row is not population under suspense allocation
resolution_comments: Fixed the bug by doing changes in Carrier_Billing_PaymentProcessing_INT manuscript

summary: Getting a page break on Declined page
description: Getting a page break on Declined page after adding the driver details. This is happening because 8.0.4 base is not supporting @ character in the HTML tag.

summary: Policy Express Version config missing in ODW
description: Navigating from Billing to Policy is dependednt on one newly added config that is missing in ODW. This is one of the fix that in last Upgrade Policy entriess were added. So with this Upgrade, those entries can be removed and new config must be made as value E3 since HIG is E3 customer.
resolution_comments: With ODW Provisioning, PolicyExpressVersion config was missing in Express\Web.config. Added it in repo and also updated Manuscript Catalog to remove Policy Entries
